drop_hint: Drop audio files or folders here to register them
drop_label: ▲ Drop  |  WAV FLAC OGG AIFF MP3 AAC OPUS  |  Del
dlg_new_msg:
Clear all settings and reset to defaults?

File list, volume, speed, and position will be lost.
dlg_load_warn_msg: Settings file is empty or invalid.
ffmpeg_ready_msg:
FFmpeg is ready.
MP3 / AAC / OPUS can now be played.
restart_msg: Restart the app to apply the change.
status_no_save_path: No save file. Use Save first.
ffmpeg_subtitle: FFmpeg is required to play MP3 / AAC / OPUS
ffmpeg_not_found: FFmpeg was not found. Choose one of the options below.
ffmpeg_manual_win:
Official: https://ffmpeg.org/download.html
Place ffmpeg.exe in a folder on your PATH and restart.

PowerShell / Terminal:
  winget install ffmpeg
ffmpeg_manual_other:
macOS:   brew install ffmpeg
Ubuntu:  sudo apt install ffmpeg
Other:   https://ffmpeg.org/download.html
ffmpeg_skip_note: * Skipping disables MP3 / AAC / OPUS. WAV / FLAC / OGG / AIFF still work.
ffmpeg_done_msg:
FFmpeg installed.
MP3 / AAC / OPUS can now be played.
